baseline._note: PRD said 1500+; actual wc -l at iteration start was 2492

current._note: API Consistency fixed 4 sites of `return (body, 404)` tuple-returns that FastAPI silently turned into `[body, 404]` HTTP-200 responses. The /v1/media/{hash} path was the only one firing in production; the other three were latent (db helpers never returned None). 4 regression tests. pytest 77 -> 81.

findings.description: Ruff autofixes (F401, UP017, I001, UP041, RUF100, F541, UP035, RUF022) + 5 dead helper functions (_md5, _format_scored_row, _now in crystal, _stream_response, _msg_dicts). Ruff errors 121->51.

Ruff style/correctness (SIM105, B904, B905, E402, E701, SIM102/103, RUF005) + ruff-config ignore for RUF001-003 math notation + DRY consolidation of 7 _now / 2 _now_iso duplicates into new api/_time.py. Ruff errors 51->8. B904 fix counts as a bug class — six HTTPException raises were masking their original cause in tracebacks.

findings.perspective: Senior Dev Audit (server.py split, Option A)
findings.description: Split api/server.py (2 417 -> 688 LOC) into 9 resource-scoped routers under api/routes/: agents, auth, contacts, feed, lake, media, routines, sessions, sources, vitals. Promoted current_contact_slug helper to api/auth.py. URLs unchanged; tests stayed green.

Fixed all 8 RUF006 asyncio-dangling-task sites. New api/_bgtasks.spawn helper adds strong task refs + logs exceptions (both failure modes the RUF006 idiom leaks). One commit per site/cluster. Chat-listener race audit + feed_loop off-by-one audit: no real bugs found beyond a minor unbounded _session_locks dict (tracked under Quality Scaffold or Performance).

Added _request_with_retry to api/delta_client.py with 3-attempt jittered exponential backoff on transient 502/503/504 and httpx Transport/Timeout errors. Applied to every idempotent read (~19 functions). Writes NOT retried because delta-store has no idempotency keys. Bounded ChatListener._session_locks with LRU eviction at 256 entries. 7 new unit tests (retry contract + session-lock cap).

Fixed four sites using `return (body, 404)` tuple-returns that FastAPI silently serialized as `[body, 404]` with HTTP 200. /v1/media/{hash} was firing this in production; the other three (/v1/sessions/{id} GET+PATCH, /v1/chat/completions session-not-found) were latent because db.get_session never returns None. All four now raise HTTPException properly. 4 regression tests covering the 404 contract via monkeypatched db helpers.

Audited api ↔ addons (cli, mcp-node, agent, connect) contracts. Found one user-visible bug: /v1/deltas GET proxy forwarded tags_include as CSV string, but delta-store expects a list via repeated query params. Multi-tag recalls from both `fathom recall --tags a,b` and the MCP recall tool silently returned empty. Fixed by splitting on comma and forwarding as list. Three regression tests. Every other response-envelope + request-body contract checked out.

Pinned upper bounds on every runtime + dev dep across api/, delta-store/, source-runner/, and pyproject dev-extras. Moved delta-store + source-runner deps out of their Dockerfiles (where pip-audit/dependabot couldn't see them) into proper requirements.txt files. Three CVEs fixed: Pillow CVE-2026-25990 + CVE-2026-40192 (floor bumped to 12.2.0), pytest CVE-2025-71176 (dev-extras floor to 9.0.3). pip-audit clean after, npm audit clean on addons/agent and addons/mcp-node.

Three latency wins, all via parallelizing independent lake reads. (1) fathom_think system prompt: 6 sequential awaits -> asyncio.gather, saves 500-2500ms per chat turn. (2) Feed-loop _has_fresh_card N+1: per-line lake query replaced by one prefetch grouped in Python (_latest_card_by_line + _is_fresh_from_map). Saves ~(N-1)*100ms per visit. (3) _gather_pool candidate fan-in: 4 sequential -> parallel, saves ~1-2s per card. 6 unit tests for the freshness map predicate.

Five fixes: (HIGH) image_path arbitrary-file-read via POST /v1/deltas sandboxed to an allowlist prefix, disabled by default (CWE-22); (MEDIUM) tokens.json + pair-codes.json now chmod 0600 after write; (LOW) pg_dump shell pipeline replaced with exec argv; (DoS defence-in-depth) tag count cap (64) and image_b64 size cap (~25MB decoded) on POST /v1/deltas. 8 new tests (6 path-traversal, 2 file-perms). CORS wildcard audited and kept (bearer-token API, no credentials).

Three test modules covering the PRD-flagged under-tested surfaces. Slug generation (grammar, uniqueness, fail-open, collision-fallback), reserved-tags gate (all branches, fail-closed on unknown gate, strip-and-re-stamp), auth (scope matrix, token CRUD, scope filter, legacy migration, contact-slug helper, cache). pytest 8 -> 60, 2x past PRD §Completion target. Mood-synthesis scoring skipped (LLM-coupled).

_now_helper.note: Hoisted into api/_time.py. Seven modules under api/ now import `now as _now` and `now_iso as _now_iso`. pairing._now returns int (different semantics) and delta-store retrievals._now are out of scope — stayed local.

cosine_distance.note: api/crystal_anchor.py cosine_distance and api/feed_crystal.py _cosine_distance are near-duplicate implementations. Candidate for consolidation into api/_time.py or a new api/_math.py.

server_py_split.note: Option A (by resource) — 9 routers under api/routes/. server.py 2 417 -> 688 LOC. Chat + crystal + fathom_think + _resolve_tools still in server.py (~200 lines); separate cleanup-pass ticket.
